caption: A man with a large, pointed grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio, wearing a white dress shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone in a room decorated with framed photos on the wall. Two logos appear on the screen: "BOSS TALK 101" in red text on the right and a circular logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, slightly shifting his expression. In the final frame, he raises his hand to touch the side of his wig. The background remains static, showing various equipment and the "LEE" logo on a yellow background behind him.
